acceptOwnership().details: The new owner accepts the ownership transfer.

params.betAmount: The total bet amount (fee is calculated from this)
params.player: The player who placed the bet

params._treasuryShareBps: Treasury share of fees in BPS

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

pendingOwner().details: Returns the address of the pending owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Starts the ownership transfer of the contract to a new account. Replaces the pending transfer if there is one. Can only be called by the current owner. Setting `newOwner` to the zero address is allowed; this can be used to cancel an initiated ownership transfer.

authorizedGames(address).notice: Authorized game contracts that can call collectFee

calculateFee(uint256).notice: Calculate the fee for a given bet amount

collectFee(address,uint256,uint256).notice: Collect fee from a game. The game must have already transferred         the fee amount to this contract before calling.

distributeFees().notice: Distribute accumulated fees to treasury and house vault

feeBps().notice: Fee in basis points applied to bet volume (default 50 = 0.5%)

houseVault().notice: House vault address (LP fee share goes here)

totalVaultFees().notice: Total fees distributed to house vault

treasuryShareBps().notice: Share of fees going to treasury in BPS (rest goes to house vault)
